title: Extraction Method B (FMS and CR)
author: Faezah Mohd Salleh
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.im9cc96

steps.instruction: Digestion of ca. 100 µl sample with Buffer ATL (Qiagen, Hilden, DE), Proteinase K and PBS for 10 min at 56 °C. undetermined, Sample 00:10:00, Digestion at 56 °C Incubation was performed on a thermomixer with 800 rpm
DNA purification following manufacturer's protocol with Buffer AW1 and Buffer AW2 (Qiagen, Hilden, DE).
Prior to elution, incubate DNA in the membrane with elution Buffer AE for 5 min at room temperature. 00:05:00, Incubation at RT
Elution proceeds by centrifugation at 8000 rpm for 1 min. 00:01:00, Centrifugation
Measure DNA concentration on Nanodrop (Thermo Fischer Scientific, Darmstadt, DE).
Transfer the solution to DNeasy Mini spin column (Qiagen, Hilden, DE) and centrifuge at 8000 rpm.
